01 — Who I Am

About Me

I'm Anushka Chandra, a Computer Science & Engineering student at Lovely Professional University, Punjab. I'm passionate about the intersection of cloud infrastructure and software development — architecting systems that are reliable, scalable, and efficient.

My work spans AWS cloud architecture — from building VPC networks and EC2 deployments to configuring CloudWatch monitoring and SNS alerting systems. On the software side, I build Java applications with robust OOP design and have hands-on experience with data structures and algorithm optimization.

I love debugging systems, from diagnosing 404 S3 key errors to improving algorithm complexity from O(n²) to O(n log n). I believe great engineering is part technical precision, part creative problem-solving.

Outside tech, I enjoy illustrative sketching and flower arrangement — creative pursuits that keep my thinking fresh and lateral.

$ whoami   Anushka Chandra — Cloud Architect & Developer $ cat skills.json | grep top   "AWS" · "Python" · "Java" · "C++" $ echo $goal   Build scalable systems that matter 🚀

Cloud Architecture

Hands-on with AWS services: EC2, S3, VPC, CloudWatch, SNS, CloudFront, and CDN architectures.

Software Development

Java (DSA, OOP, Swing GUI), Python (Flask), and full-stack web development with Django.

Career Goal

To design enterprise-grade cloud solutions and build full-stack applications that scale globally.

Interests

Illustrative sketching, gardening, and flower arrangement.

03 — What I've Built

Featured Projects

AWS

Problem Solved

Automated Resource Monitor with AWS Alerts

Designed an automated monitoring system that proactively tracks EC2 CPU utilisation and triggers real-time alerts, eliminating reactive incident response and enabling faster system stability.

  • CloudWatch alarms with custom CPU threshold configuration
  • SNS-powered automated email alert delivery pipeline
  • Proactive monitoring reducing mean time to detection
  • Scalable alarm architecture for multi-instance environments
Amazon EC2 CloudWatch SNS Alarm Thresholds Monitoring Metrics
GitHub
AWS

Problem Solved

Document Management System

Engineered a secure, scalable cloud document platform handling high traffic, with a private S3 backend for durable storage and Nginx-fronted Flask app on EC2 for public access.

  • Full VPC provisioning: IGW, Route Tables, Public Subnets
  • Python Flask app deployed on t2.micro EC2 behind Nginx
  • Private S3 bucket for secure document persistence
  • End-to-end file upload validation and error handling
AWS VPC EC2 S3 Python Flask Nginx SSH
GitHub
AWS

Problem Solved

Static Website with Secure CDN Architecture

Deployed a globally performant serverless static website using S3 + CloudFront CDN with HTTPS, debugging real S3 404 NoSuchKey errors through architectural root cause analysis.

  • S3 static hosting with proper index/error routing
  • CloudFront CDN with HTTPS redirect and caching policies
  • Reduced latency via global edge distribution
  • Diagnosed & resolved S3 object hierarchy prefix errors
Amazon S3 CloudFront Bucket Policies CDN HTTPS
GitHub
Java

Problem Solved

Mental Health Assistant

Built a Java Swing desktop application for daily emotional tracking, delivering an event-driven GUI with persistent file-based storage, mood analytics, and motivational content.

  • Mood evaluation and daily log tracking with history review
  • Motivational quote generation engine
  • File-based persistent storage with OOP modularity
  • Seamless event-driven Swing GUI interaction
Java Swing GUI OOP File Handling Event-Driven
GitHub
Django

Problem Solved

Hospital Management System

Developed a full-stack hospital management web application using Django's MVT architecture, providing patient and appointment management with routing, ORM database handling, and built-in security.

  • Django MVT architecture: URL routing → View → Model → Template
  • Built-in CSRF protection and secure form handling
  • Rapid development leveraging Django ORM for database ops
  • Future scope: cloud deployment, real-time slots, payment integration
Django Python HTML CSS SQLite
GitHub

08 — Community Impact

Social Internship

Social Internship — NGO / Community Welfare

Social Work Volunteer — Food, Shelter & Medical Aid

Completed · Lovely Professional University Requirement

  • Engaged with non-profit and social welfare organizations to address fundamental community needs — food security, shelter access, and healthcare support.
  • Contributed to food distribution systems, inventory coordination, and meal preparation operations at community service centers.
  • Assisted in organizing health education events and administrative support for clinics serving underprivileged communities with limited healthcare access.
  • Collaborated with diverse groups including families, veterans, and elderly individuals — developing empathy, cross-cultural communication, and field teamwork skills.
  • Gained firsthand understanding of socioeconomic disparities and the real-world application of resource management and community outreach.
Community Outreach Food Distribution Healthcare Support Event Organization Teamwork Problem Solving
